extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco attacked with 17km to go on the final categorized climb after GC neutralization ended at 25km, soloing to victory by nearly a minute.
tactical_patterns: GC neutralization until 25km created compressed racing window that favored explosive attackers over sustained climbers.
EVENEPOEL attacked at 17km on categorized climb, demonstrating ability to accelerate decisively after extended soft-pedaling neutralization.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: built nearly 1-minute gap in 14km after cold start, showing superior response to neutralized-to-racing transition
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: neutral: briefly followed Evenepoel's attack but couldn't sustain, confirming still a tier below elite stage racers
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: present in decisive move and won chase sprint, showing willingness to race aggressively despite circumstances
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: neutral: initiated attacks when racing resumed but couldn't sustain advantage over Evenepoel
